LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: EAN Simple Item Info View Array
LightningComponentBundle.description: Array of LWC views for showing basic information about s-kaupat.fi products by calling an Apex class for the product html and then scraping it.

property.name: imageWidth
property.label: Image Width
property.description: Maximum width in pixels that the images can take on the screen. This will also affect the size of the images fetched from the server.

property.name: imageHeight
property.label: Image Height
property.description: Maximum height in pixels that the images can take on the screen. This will also affect the size of the images fetched from the server.

property.name: inEnglish
property.label: Display in English
property.description: When toggled on, the text inside the component will switch to English.
